pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize Java 11 features or comply with a Java 11 baseline requirement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 11 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo (like 0.7.7) do not support Java 11 class files (major version 55), causing runtime errors or coverage failures during the build.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed the javax.inject module from the JDK. Code using @Inject requires the external Jakarta Inject API dependency to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed the javax.annotation module from the JDK. Code using annotations like @PostConstruct or @PreDestroy requires the external Jakarta Annotation API dependency to compile.
